item.title: iPosta 1.0.1
item.description:
This is the first public beta of iPosta. We'd love your feedback!
What's new: - Gmail and Microsoft 365 / Outlook support - Real-time push notifications via backend relay - Unified inbox with thread view - Rich text composer with attachments - Auto-update support (you're using it right now)
Known limitations: - Some inline images in forwarded threads may not display correctly - Search is local only (no server-side search yet)
Please report any bugs or feedback to: support@iposta.app
